Off Calendar Sep-24-2009 Continued To Oct-13-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
John Chu, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Alfred D. Moore

No other appearances, Plaintiff Alfred Moore's Ex parte on right to attach and for issuance of writ of attachment is denied.
Temporary Protective Order granted as to defendant's bank accounts in the amount of $471,000.00 subject to $10,000 undertaking.
Continued for hearing on application for writ of attachment on October 13, 2009 at 10:30 a.m. in Dept. 610. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
